summary: Poorly documented downsampled audience transfer with unclear improvements and minimal show commentary
review: The reviewer criticizes the lack of clear notes about this version’s source and suspects aggressive down‑sampling that reduces fidelity, making the recording quality questionable. No musical performance details are provided, so the show itself cannot be evaluated from this review.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one low‑star review focused on technical shortcomings and missing documentation; no positive comments about performance or sound quality to raise the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes possible downsampling (file size ~¼ of comparable versions), lack of clear documentation, and doubts about any audible improvement; overall fidelity appears compromised.
